title: ANSSI Views on the Post-Quantum Cryptography Transition
summary: Position paper from ANSSI, the French national cybersecurity authority, setting out its views and planned phased approach for the transition to post-quantum cryptography.

title: France National Quantum Strategy - Annual Report 2022
summary: Annual report of the French national quantum strategy established in 2021 under the France 2030 plan, providing a roadmap for the government to coordinate and accelerate quantum research and industrialisation.
